evidence_excerpt: After diagnosis and advice on photoprotection, he had decreased frequency/severity of recurrences and, eight years after onset, was working in construction with only infrequent mild exacerbations; one moderately severe flare occurred after prolonged sun exposure.

quality_of_life.evidence_excerpt: He experiences infrequent, mild exacerbations, with a moderately severe flare last year after prolonged sun exposure.

timeline_events.evidence_excerpt: The use of sunscreens decreased the frequency and severity of recurrences.
Eight years since he first developed HV, he is currently working in construction with intermittent, short periods of sun exposure.
Apart from a moderately severe flare last year after prolonged sun exposure.

notes_on_uncertainty: The report includes two cases. This summary focuses on Case 1 because it provides long-term follow-up. Exact dates for some improvements are not specified; short-term categorization for sunscreen-related improvement is inferred as occurring after initiation of treatment.
